2604.12377.title: SCRIPT: A Subcharacter Compositional Representation Injection Module for Korean Pre-Trained Language Models
2604.12377.paper_summary: Korean is a morphologically rich language with a featural writing system in which each character is systematically composed of subcharacter units known as Jamo. These subcharacters not only determine the visual structure of Korean but also encode frequent and linguistically meaningful morphophonological processes. However, most current Korean language models (LMs) are based on subword tokenization schemes, which are not explicitly designed to capture the internal compositional structure of characters. To address this limitation, we propose SCRIPT, a model-agnostic module that injects subcharacter compositional knowledge into Korean PLMs. SCRIPT allows to enhance subword embeddings with structural granularity, without requiring architectural changes or additional pre-training. As a result, SCRIPT enhances all baselines across various Korean natural language understanding (NLU) and generation (NLG) tasks. Moreover, beyond performance gains, detailed linguistic analyses show that SCRIPT reshapes the embedding space in a way that better captures grammatical regularities and semantically cohesive variations. Our code is available at https://github.com/SungHo3268/SCRIPT.
2604.12377.paper_summary_zh: 韓語是一種形態豐富的語言，具有特徵性的書寫系統，每個字符都是由稱為 Jamo 的子字符單元系統性組成的。這些子字符不僅決定了韓語的視覺結構，還編碼了頻繁且具有語言意義的形態音位過程。然而，目前大多數韓語語言模型（LMs）是基於子詞標記化方案，這些方案並未明確設計用來捕捉字符的內部組成結構。為了解決這一限制，我們提出了 SCRIPT，一個與模型無關的模塊，將子字符組成知識注入韓語 PLMs。SCRIPT 允許在不需要架構變更或額外預訓練的情況下，增強子詞嵌入的結構粒度。因此，SCRIPT 在各種韓語自然語言理解（NLU）和生成（NLG）任務中增強了所有基準模型。此外，除了性能提升，詳細的語言學分析顯示 SCRIPT 重新塑造了嵌入空間，更好地捕捉語法規律和語義連貫的變化。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/SungHo3268/SCRIPT 獲得。
2604.12377.author: SungHo Kim et.al.
2604.12377.authors: SungHo Kim, Juhyeong Park, Eda Atalay, SangKeun Lee
